title: User Profile
description: Schema enforcing structural and format validation for core user profile metadata.

userId.description: The unique, immutable identifier for the user. Must conform to a standard UUIDv4 format.

emailAddress.description: The user's primary contact email address. Used for authentication and system notifications.

website.description: The URL of the user's personal website or portfolio. Must include a valid protocol scheme (e.g., https://).

lastLogin.description: Timestamp tracking when the user most recently authenticated. Must follow the ISO 8601 extended format (e.g., YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ssZ).

ipAddress.description: The public IPv4 address recorded during the user's last active session (e.g., 192.0.2.1).
